title: Preimage Size of Factorial Zeroes Function
titleCn: 阶乘函数后 K 个零

testcases.input: k = 0 Output: 5 Explanation: 0!, 1!, 2!, 3!, and 4! end with k = 0 zeroes.
k = 5 Output: 0 Explanation: There is no x such that x! ends in k = 5 zeroes.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There is no x such that x! ends in k = 5 zeroes.
